title: Kreebles
description: Dastardly little creatures inhabit the depths, be on guard as you explore underground.
body: [![Explore Mods Button Link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df3ae95ef20a2470bd7009a7a26bd24880b1a86.png)](https://khazoda.com) ![Kreebles Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccddd72e975490a7937270673faf96111216526b.png) #### Kreebles inhabit rocks deep underground, attacking anyone who dares disturb their slumber. ![Gif of a kreeble attack](https://github.com/Khazoda/kreebles/blob/main/web-assets/Kreeble_Attack.gif?raw=true) - Download the [optional resourcepack](https://github.com/Khazoda/kreebles/releases/download/resourcepack/Visible.Kreeblestones.zip) to be able to see kreeblestones before mining them - Kreeblestones generate more often in the deepslate layer, but you may come across a few kreebles while mining in the stone layer too - The dastardly talisman has a low drop chance from kreebles, but holds ultimate power over them
